segments.text:
PRACTICE QUESTION 11 KEY
You have predicted the amino acid sequences of several proteins based on their open reading frames.  The significant domains are shown below.  Predict the final localization(s) and any orientation of domains for each. Assume that any soluble protein in the ER is transported to the Golgi.
Rectangle = 25 aa hydrophobic-rich sequence
+/- = regions of positively or negatively charged amino acids
N = amino terminus; C = carboxyl terminus
Others = single letter amino acid code
